lowValueReason: Routine check on the new 'Hollywood for mobile phones' model (PR #7 — radar categories 21–24, on-camera voice rules, ≤3 actionable cap, time budget). Brief and content drafts refreshed: previous brief had 5 'Act on this week' items and 0 visual content drafts — both now corrected (3 actionable items each with time estimates, 2 of 4 drafts are now visual formats: piece-to-camera + travel vlog beat sheet). All 24 radar categories walked; gaps surfaced for app-store charts, Mandarin reputation watch, Reddit qualitative — all require network access. RSS sources still blocked (networkPolicyBlocked: true on last fetch, 25 of 26 sources host_not_allowed) so intel sweep was again skipped; environment-side allowlist fix is the only remaining unblocker.
metadata: Second routine-check run on the new Claude-Code-routine contract. Validates the PR #7 model changes — visual content mandatory, actionable cap at 3, time estimates on every actionable opportunity.

lowValueReason: Verification run only. npm run feeds reported networkPolicyBlocked: true (25 of 26 sources host_not_allowed) — the verification environment's outbound egress allowlist does not cover the RSS hostnames. Brief produced from existing seed state (awards, speaking, media, contacts, press) and the documented weekly focus. Code-level fix shipped this run: realistic User-Agent, denied/timeout/upstream error classification, networkPolicyBlocked flag, Google News RSS search fallbacks. The remaining unblocker is environment-level — the routine's Claude Code on the web environment policy needs the RSS hosts on its allowlist (see knowledge/OPPORTUNITY_RADAR.md → 'Environment network policy').
metadata: First successful routine run after the AI-agent-pipeline → Claude-Code-routine rebuild. Validates the new contract end-to-end.
